title: How To Set Up An Aesthetics Business | Dr Tim's Tips
filename: How To Set Up An Aesthetics Business ｜ Dr Tim_s Tips.en.vtt
excerpt: So how do you set up an ascetics business well you could write a book on this but also there's basically four main components you need to get the technical skills that bolt onto your clinical skills you've already got you need to get the products and supplies so that's signing up…

segments.text: so how do you set up an ascetics business well you could write a book on this but also there's basically four main components you need to get the technical skills that bolt onto your clinical skills you've already got you need to get the products and supplies so that's signing up to a pharmacy they often will check your insurance and your medical qualifications if they are a good company and once you've got that you can order your supplies and then you need to find a route to market that's how are you actually going to get clients and that's basically all about your marketing and it can be really simple can be your current social network or you can go and create a Facebook Ads or you can work in affiliate businesses such as sounds and all of those things will get your first client and then you need to be insured I really recommend I think it's compulsory if you're a health care professional that you are insured and so with those four things in place those are the basics of how to set up an aesthetics business obviously video training course and certainly a skin Viva we would give

you tons of information on that there's a couple of few hundred pages of text and a practical there's practical training days and there's a lot of support afterwards and but those are the high-level things you need to set up an assessing business it's probably the quickest and easiest business that you can set up when you correspond it to the revenue that you can earn and I'm often surprised people do say oh it's a lot to train and even dropping ten thousand pounds on a training course is nothing in the grand scheme of things if you go on to earn a living by doing that process and it's a way more expensive to open a corner shop even a hairdresser and will spend more to get themselves to the point where they have their own functioning business often so it's faced it's fairly straightforward when you know the big pieces but there's a lot of hard work involved a lot of training and you need to continuously be learning as well but those are the basics of how you set up an aesthetics business
